basic_details.job_title: District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 17 Junior Typist, Steno and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist & Stenographer Grade-III
basic_details.short_information: District Court Rayagada has officially announced the Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist & Stenographer Grade-III Recruitment 2026 with 17 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 01/2026 at the official website of District Court Rayagada. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 42 years and hold qualifications such as Graduate degree, Diploma in Computer Application, and required Typing/Shorthand speed can submit their offline applications up to 17 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 42 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/SEBC/Women: 5 years PWD/Ex-serviceman: As per rules

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Diploma in Computer Application, Typing/Shorthand speed
qualification.details: For Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist and Stenographer Grade III: Citizen of India +3 examination or equivalent Diploma in Computer Application Ability to speak, read and write Odia and passed a test in Odia equivalent to M.E. standard Good character Sound health, good physique and free from organic defects or bodily infirmity Not more than one spouse living, if married For Junior Typist: Minimum speed of 40 words in type writing per minute For Stenographer Grade III: Minimum speed of 80 words in short hand and 40 words in type writing per minute

salary_details.details: Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist: Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) Junior Typist: Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) Stenographer Grade-III: Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level 7)

selection_process: Written competitive examination Computer test Viva-voce test
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Court Rayagada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://rayagada.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the District Court Rayagada Recruitment 2026 is 17th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 17 vacancies for the posts of Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist, Junior Typist, and Stenographer Grade-III.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification is a +3 examination or equivalent, along with a Diploma in Computer Application. Specific typing and shorthand speeds are also required for certain posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The age limit for applicants is between 18 to 42 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications by post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 19,900/- to Rs. 63,200/- (Level 4) for Junior Clerk-cum-Copyist and Junior Typist, and Rs. 25,500/- to Rs. 81,100/- (Level 7) for Stenographer Grade-III.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the District Court Rayagada Recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a written competitive examination, a computer test, and a viva-voce test.

faq.question: Q8. Where should the application form be sent?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to the OFFICE OF THE REGISTRAR, CIVIL COURTS, RAYAGADA, AT/PO-RAYAGADA, PIN-765001, DISTRICT-RAYAGADA, ODISHA.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee mentioned?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What are the required typing and shorthand speeds for the posts?
faq.answer: For Junior Typist, a minimum speed of 40 words per minute is required. For Stenographer Grade III, a minimum speed of 80 words in shorthand and 40 words in type writing per minute is required.
